message:
fix(init): add .beads-credential-key to project-root .gitignore (GH#2695)

Defense-in-depth: add credential key file to ProjectGitignorePatterns
so bd doctor detects and fixes missing coverage at the project root
level, complementing the existing .beads/.gitignore protection.

PR: #2743
